'''鈭歯g-b-s''' ('''kangabas''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:challan|challan]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-b-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:challan|challan]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歯g-b-s
|-
! Lemma
| kangabas
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thingabas|thingabas]] || [[word:jingabas|jingabas]] || [[word:shingabas|shingabas]] || [[word:kingabas|kingabas]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthungabas|thuthungabas]] || [[word:jujungabas|jujungabas]] || [[word:shushungabas|shushungabas]] || [[word:kukungabas|kukungabas]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thungabas|thungabas]] || [[word:jungabas|jungabas]] || [[word:shungabas|shungabas]] || [[word:kungabas|kungabas]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thungabas|thungabas]] || [[word:jungabas|jungabas]] || [[word:shungabas|shungabas]] || [[word:kungabas|kungabas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thengabas|thengabas]] || [[word:jengabas|jengabas]] || [[word:shengabas|shengabas]] || [[word:kengabas|kengabas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothongabas|thothongabas]] || [[word:jojongabas|jojongabas]] || [[word:shoshongabas|shoshongabas]] || [[word:kokongabas|kokongabas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thongabas|thongabas]] || [[word:jongabas|jongabas]] || [[word:shongabas|shongabas]] || [[word:kongabas|kongabas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thongabas|thongabas]] || [[word:jongabas|jongabas]] || [[word:shongabas|shongabas]] || [[word:kongabas|kongabas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙ngabas|th忙ngabas]] || [[word:j忙ngabas|j忙ngabas]] || [[word:sh忙ngabas|sh忙ngabas]] || [[word:k忙ngabas|k忙ngabas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathangabas|thathangabas]] || [[word:jajangabas|jajangabas]] || [[word:shashangabas|shashangabas]] || [[word:kakangabas|kakangabas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thangabas|thangabas]] || [[word:jangabas|jangabas]] || [[word:shangabas|shangabas]] || [[word:kangabas|kangabas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thangabas|thangabas]] || [[word:jangabas|jangabas]] || [[word:shangabas|shangabas]] || [[word:kangabas|kangabas]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shangabas|shangabas]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshangabas|goshangabas]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishangabas|gokishangabas]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shangabasn眉|shangabasn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshangabasnkn眉|goshangabasnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishangabasn眉|gokishangabasn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shangabash毛|shangabash毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshangabasnksh毛|goshangabasnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishangabash毛|gokishangabash毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shangabasro|shangabasro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshangabasnkro|goshangabasnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishangabasro|gokishangabasro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shangabasmu|shangabasmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshangabasnkmu|goshangabasnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishangabasmu|gokishangabasmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shangabasher|shangabasher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshangabasnksher|goshangabasnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishangabasher|gokishangabasher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shangabasng|shangabasng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshangabasnkng|goshangabasnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishangabasng|gokishangabasng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shangabasya|shangabasya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshangabasnkya|goshangabasnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishangabasya|gokishangabasya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shangabasyam|shangabasyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshangabasnkyam|goshangabasnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishangabasyam|gokishangabasyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shangabasn眉sh毛|shangabasn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshangabasnkn眉sh毛|goshangabasnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishangabasn眉sh毛|gokishangabasn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shangabasn眉ro|shangabasn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshangabasnkn眉ro|goshangabasnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishangabasn眉ro|gokishangabasn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shangabasn眉mu|shangabasn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshangabasnkn眉mu|goshangabasnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishangabasn眉mu|gokishangabasn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shangabash毛n眉|shangabash毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshangabasnksh毛n眉|goshangabasnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishangabash毛n眉|gokishangabash毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shangabash毛ro|shangabash毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshangabasnksh毛ro|goshangabasnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishangabash毛ro|gokishangabash毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shangabash毛mu|shangabash毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshangabasnksh毛mu|goshangabasnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishangabash毛mu|gokishangabash毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shangabasron眉|shangabasron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshangabasnkron眉|goshangabasnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishangabasron眉|gokishangabasron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shangabasrosh毛|shangabasrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshangabasnkrosh毛|goshangabasnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishangabasrosh毛|gokishangabasrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shangabasromu|shangabasromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshangabasnkromu|goshangabasnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishangabasromu|gokishangabasromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shangabasmun眉|shangabasmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshangabasnkmun眉|goshangabasnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishangabasmun眉|gokishangabasmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shangabasmush毛|shangabasmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshangabasnkmush毛|goshangabasnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishangabasmush毛|gokishangabasmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shangabasmuro|shangabasmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshangabasnkmuro|goshangabasnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishangabasmuro|gokishangabasmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
